strings: Critical Error.Invalid Part number.Reprogramming process will be aborted.m
Errors getting ECU Part Number.Please make sure all cables are connected and retry.H
Reprogramming Completed.IMPORTANT:Turn the ignition key OFF for 15 seconds and remove all data-link cables, before starting the vehicle.
